parameters.name: active
parameters.label: Active
parameters.description: While On, the sends information to the network port. When Off, data is not sent.

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.label: Protocol
parameters.description: Selects the network protocol to use. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: netaddress
parameters.label: Network Address
parameters.description: The network address of the server computer. This address is a standard WWW address, such as 'foo' or 'foo.bar.com'. You can put an IP address (e.g. 100.123.45.78). If you put "localhost", it means the

parameters.name: port
parameters.label: Network Port
parameters.description: The port which OSC Out will send packets to.

parameters.name: localaddress
parameters.label: Local Address
parameters.description: Specify an IP address to send from, useful when the system has mulitple NICs (Network Interface Card) and you want to select which one to use.

parameters.name: maxsize
parameters.label: Max Queue Size
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of messages OSC Out will try to send at a single time.

parameters.name: maxsizeunit
parameters.label: Max Queue Size Unit
parameters.description: Select the units to use for this parameter, Samples, Frames, or Seconds

parameters.name: cookalways
parameters.label: Cook Every Frame
parameters.description: Specifies that this should be cooked every frame regardless of CHOPs below it are cooking.

parameters.name: numericformat
parameters.label: Numeric Format
parameters.description: Choose the data format to send data between 32-bit integer, 32-bit float, or 64-bit double.

parameters.name: maxbytes
parameters.label: Max Message Bytes
parameters.description: Limits the size of the outgoing message packets and splits up the message accordingly.

parameters.name: sendevents
parameters.label: Send Events Every Cook
parameters.description: When on, OSC Out will send all channels every cook regardless if the value has changed. When off, OSC Out only sends data which has changed.

parameters.name: timeslice
parameters.label: Time Slice
parameters.description: Turning this on forces the channels to be " ".  A is the time between the last cook frame and the current cook frame.

parameters.name: scope
parameters.label: Scope
parameters.description: To determine which channels get affected, some CHOPs use a string on the Common page. See .

parameters.name: srselect
parameters.label: Sample Rate Match
parameters.description: Handle cases where multiple input CHOPs' sample rates are different. When Resampling occurs, the curves are interpolated according to the Interpolation Method Option, or "Linear" if the Interpolate Op

parameters.name: exportmethod
parameters.label: Export Method
parameters.description: This will determine how to connect the channel to the parameter. Refer to the article for more information.

parameters.name: autoexportroot
parameters.label: Export Root
parameters.description: This path points to the root node where all of the paths that exporting by are relative to.

parameters.name: exporttable
parameters.label: Export Table
parameters.description: The used to hold the export information when using the Table Methods (See above).
